debug_info.goal:
case mk.cons
a : Type
bs : List a
n : a
ns : List a
ok :
  ((n :: ns).isEmpty = true → bs.isEmpty = true ∨ bs.length = 1) ∧
    (bs.isEmpty = true → (n :: ns).isEmpty = true ∨ (n :: ns).length = 1)
⊢ failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)

failed_attempts:
simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.fromSL]
      cases ns with
      | nil => simp
      | cons n' ns' => simp [List.init]

cases ns with
      | nil =>
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil]
      | cons n' ns' =>
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil]

cases ns with
      | nil =>
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil]
      | cons m ms =>
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, List.init]

induction ns with
      | nil =>
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil]
      | cons n' ns ih =>
        simp [List.init, SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.fromSL, ih]

cases ns with
      | nil =>
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL]
      | cons n' ns' =>
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL, List.init]

cases ns with
      | nil =>
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL]
      | cons n' ns' =>
        simp [List.init, SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL]
        cases bs <;> simp

simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.fromSL, List.init]
      cases ns with
      | nil =>
        cases bs with
        | nil =>
          simp [SymList.nil, SymList.tailSL, SymList.fromSL, List.init, List.reverse]
        | cons b bs' =>
          cases bs' with
          | nil =>
            simp [SymList.nil, SymList.tailSL, SymList.fromSL, List.init, List.reverse]
          | cons b2 bs'' =>
            simp [SymList.nil, SymList.tailSL, SymList.fromSL, List.init, List.reverse]
      | cons n2 ns' =>
        simp [SymList.nil, SymList.tailSL, SymList.fromSL, List.init, List.reverse]

cases ns with
      | nil =>
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL]
      | cons n' ns' =>
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL]

cases bs with
      | nil =>
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, List.init]
      | cons b bs' =>
        simp [SymList.init, SymList.reverse, SymList.tailSL, SymList.nil, List.init]
